summary: Stores and emits an unsigned integer control value.
description: UInt is a Max-style unsigned integer value object. in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang emits the current value.
runtimeBehavior: in is the hot inlet: typed values update and emit, bang emits the stored unsigned integer, and set ... updates silently. cold updates silently.

ports.description: Hot inlet: typed unsigned integer values update and emit; bang emits the stored value; set ... updates silently.
Cold inlet: compatible unsigned integer values or set ... update without emitting.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.

example.title: Trigger an integer value
example.description: Use bang to re-emit the current integer after a set event updates it silently.
